foods.name: Curative: Feeble Fever
foods.description: Instantly cures the disease "Feeble Fever".

foods.name: Curative: Roundworms
foods.description: Instantly cures Roundworm infestations.

foods.name: Curative: Slimy Tremors
foods.description: Instantly cures the disease "Slimy Tremors".

foods.name: Curative: Creakliver
foods.description: Instantly cures the disease "Creakliver".

foods.name: Curative: Lunatic Shakes
foods.description: Instantly cures the disease "Lunatic Shakes".

foods.name: Curative: Leprosy
foods.description: Instantly cures the disease "Leprosy".

foods.name: Curative: Mummy Diseases
foods.description: Instantly cures mummy diseases such as "Mummy Rot" and "Mummy Ache". Only one disease is cured per dose.

foods.name: Weak Hellfreeze
foods.description: Known colloquially as "Heckfreeze", this concoction is consumed to cure all stacks of Lesser Hellfire.

foods.name: Hellfreeze
foods.description: When consumed, this concoction cures all stacks of Hellfire and Lesser Hellfire.

foods.name: Strong Hellfreeze
foods.description: This industrial-strength Hellfreeze cures all stacks of Greater Hellfire, Hellfire, and Lesser Hellfire when ingested.

foods.name: Mild Ratkin Digestif
foods.description: This pleasant beverage helps you digest cheese.

foods.name: Potent Ratkin Digestif
foods.description: This tasty beverage helps you digest cheese.

foods.name: Amazing Ratkin Digestif
foods.description: This delicious beverage helps you digest cheese.

foods.name: Simple Ratkin Aparatif
foods.description: An appetizer intended to be eaten before the cheese course.

foods.name: Tasty Ratkin Aparatif
foods.description: An appetizer intended to be eaten before the cheese course.

foods.name: Delicious Ratkin Aparatif
foods.description: An appetizer intended to be eaten before the cheese course.

foods.name: Magic Ooze Syrup
foods.description: The not-quite-dead remains of an ooze. It's mainly used as an ingredient in other potions, but it does have a healing effect when drunk -- assuming you have the gastronomic experience to tolerate the flavor without vomiting.

foods.name: Warden Strength Drink
foods.description: Blessed by a high priest of Au-Shin, this tube of liquid glows like a light.

foods.name: Moxie's Flutter Butter
foods.description: A lotion created by Moxie of the Crafting Caravan in order to make long distance fluttering less stressful when applied directly to the wings. Unfortunately, this formula only works on Fae.

foods.name: Moxie's Birdie Butter
foods.description:
A lotion created by Moxie of the Crafting Caravan in order to make long distance flight less stressful when applied directly to the wings. Unfortunately, this formula only works on druidic bird forms.
WARNING: Leaving bird form will cancel the effects of this lotion!

foods.name: Moxie's Bat Butter
foods.description:
A lotion created by Moxie of the Crafting Caravan in order to make long distance flight less stressful when applied directly to the wings. Unfortunately, this formula only works on giant bats. Also, since giant bat wings are so large, the bottle contains fewer doses than the other butters, but it's more effective, too.
WARNING: Leaving giant bat form will cancel the effects of this lotion!

foods.name: Rez and Shine
foods.description: A small metal cylinder with liquid sealed inside. There's a pull-tab on top to open it. The cylinder bears an image of a smiling Spring fairy. If you stare for a moment, she seems to mouth the cryptic words "Rez and Shine, You Live Again! Original Honey Flavor!"

foods.name: Licking Moss
foods.description: A small stone covered in special moss. Licking the moss gives ranalon a potent hallucinogenic effect. Other creatures experience a less-dramatic effect, but it's still notable.

foods.name: Treant Apple
foods.description: A rock-hard fruit covered in ashy powder. It looks magical, but poisonous. Very poisonous.

foods.name: Skeleton Dispersal Fluid
foods.description: A psychic enhancement that lets you harness your formidable skeletal knowledge into a weapon. Tastes like chalk.

foods.name: Tempest in a Teapot
foods.description: A sarcastically-named elven drink that replenishes tempest energy. (For easy cleanup, the teapot magically biodegrades when the tea is consumed.)

foods.name: Serene Precision Tea
foods.description: An elf-only tea that boosts the chance of anatomy critical hits with archery attacks. (For easy cleanup, the teapot magically biodegrades when the tea is consumed.)

foods.name: Gurtiv's Mind Lozenge
foods.description: An over-engineered potion that's quite tricky to make. There are probably easier ways to make an equivalent potion. But at least it's not addictive.

foods.name: Osuk's Quencher
foods.description: This fire-protection potion is a delicious grape-esque flavor. It's a popular recreational drink even among the non-engulfed.

foods.name: Snaptight
foods.description: A popular Statehelm beverage for busy individuals who need to focus.

foods.name: Frog Trick
foods.description: An illicit and dangerous substance most often used to cheat at sports.

foods.name: Gambleglee
foods.description:
This twee honey-flavored beverage has become a popular vice among gamblers rich and poor. It enhances the pleasure received from gambling.
+10% Gaming XP Earned

foods.name: Basic Blood Serum
foods.description: A secret formula that lets mortals take advantage of necromantic blood, if they are hardy enough.

foods.name: Bloodcharge Serum
foods.description: A secret formula that lets mortals take advantage of necromantic blood, if they are hardy enough.

foods.name: Filthy Animal Fat
foods.description: Disgusting fat from an animal.

foods.name: Lumpy Animal Fat
foods.description: Fat from an animal.

foods.name: Typical Animal Fat
foods.description: A large block of animal fat.

foods.name: Smooth Animal Fat
foods.description: A large unbroken block of high-quality animal fat.

foods.name: Ultra-Claggy Animal Fat
foods.description: A big glob of high-quality animal fat.

foods.name: Supernatural Animal Fat
foods.description: A big glob of high-quality animal fat that is clearly beyond what would be found in a normal animal.

foods.name: Shoddy Tallow
foods.description: Low-quality, but shelf-stable, rendered fat.

foods.name: Crude Tallow
foods.description: A useful form of rendered fat.

foods.name: Nice Tallow
foods.description: Rendered fat that's good for most of your everyday utility-fat needs.

foods.name: Great Tallow
foods.description: High-quality rendered fat.

foods.name: Amazing Tallow
foods.description: Very high-quality rendered fat.

foods.name: Incredible Tallow
foods.description: Extremely high-quality rendered fat.

foods.name: Tealight
foods.description:
A tiny short-lived light used for decoration.

Tealights are non-interactible. They last for 5 minutes. You can deploy up to 5 tealights at a time.

foods.name: Head Candle
foods.description: A lump of wax that can be affixed to the head to provide light. Don't worry: it only looks dangerous because of how dangerous it is.

foods.name: Shoddy Floral Candle
foods.description:
It has a vague flower smell.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Rough Floral Candle
foods.description:
It has a modest flower smell.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Crude Floral Candle
foods.description:
A bland floral scent is slightly uplifted by the tang of violets.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Decent Floral Candle
foods.description:
It's quite strong in potency, but also very generic, with no specific flower scent coming through.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Nice Floral Candle
foods.description:
The height of generic floral scents. Pleasant but forgettable.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Quality Floral Candle
foods.description:
A potent floral scent that features red roses plucked at the height of their crimson yearning. Or so it smells.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Great Floral Candle
foods.description:
The elven lily provides a base scent for this candle, and the bitter-cold winterhue flower accentuates it.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Amazing Floral Candle
foods.description:
A scent that brings forth happy visions of flowers basking in the sun.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Astounding Floral Candle
foods.description:
A bouquet of beautiful smells.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Awesome Floral Candle
foods.description:
A heady floral smell that challenges the olfactory sense of flowers, and what is a flower, really?

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Incredible Floral Candle
foods.description:
A flower candle that you can never get tired of smelling.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Crude Bacon Candle
foods.description:
It smells like burned bacon! Which isn't a great smell. It makes you really want to eat some bacon, though.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Nice Bacon Candle
foods.description:
The lovely aroma of bacon reminds you of how tasty bacon is.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Amazing Bacon Candle
foods.description:
This smell is a cultivated bacon odor, accentuating the highs and diminishing the lows, making real bacon taste incredible.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Incredible Bacon Candle
foods.description:
This smells less like bacon than some candles, but the smell synergizes with real bacon scent in an incredible way.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Crude Seafoam Candle
foods.description:
An almost-overpowering odor of the sea. It reminds you to hold your breath underwater.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Nice Seafoam Candle
foods.description:
A tantalizing reminder of the beach.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Amazing Seafoam Candle
foods.description:
You can almost hear the ocean waves when you smell this pleasing sea-inspired aroma.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Incredible Seafoam Candle
foods.description:
It so accurately replicates the sensory experience of the ocean that those afraid of water should stay clear.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Crude Desert Breeze Candle
foods.description:
The smell of sand in wind. Because there's nothing like smelling a sandstorm in the air to quicken one's pace.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Nice Desert Breeze Candle
foods.description:
A bouquet of aromas that bring to mind sprinting in the endless desert.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Amazing Desert Breeze Candle
foods.description:
This delicate smell evokes the desert without actually having any icky desert smells.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Incredible Desert Breeze Candle
foods.description:
Evokes the wind in your hair (even if you have no hair) to facilitate an incredible runner's high.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Crude Arctic Dawn Candle
foods.description:
This smells like a cold, cold, morning in a fairly-unpleasant-smelling place.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Nice Arctic Dawn Candle
foods.description:
This smells like a warm drink on a cold, cold morning.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Amazing Arctic Dawn Candle
foods.description:
This smells like waking up to a cold dawn around a warming campfire, with a loving pet wolf-dog nearby who's happy you're finally awake.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Incredible Arctic Dawn Candle
foods.description:
Brings to mind the timeless beauty of a frozen landscape before shattering that image with sensations of warmth.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Crude Dark Sight Candle
foods.description:
A heady bouquet encompassing the beauty of both life and death. It has a slightly hallucinogenic effect.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Nice Dark Sight Candle
foods.description:
A heady bouquet encompassing the beauty of both life and death. It has a slightly hallucinogenic effect.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Amazing Dark Sight Candle
foods.description:
A heady bouquet encompassing the beauty of both life and death. It has a slightly hallucinogenic effect.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Incredible Dark Sight Candle
foods.description:
A heady bouquet encompassing the beauty of both life and death. It has a slightly hallucinogenic effect.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Lich Illusion Candle
foods.description:
An intoxicating aroma of autumn flavors mixed with potent hallucinogens.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Crude Desensitizing Candle
foods.description:
A smoky, musty candle that evokes the danger of fire.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Nice Desensitizing Candle
foods.description:
An almost-smoky smell with an earthy undertone, suggesting a forest fire.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Amazing Desensitizing Candle
foods.description:
A pleasant odor reminiscent of burning hickory, but backed by acrid smoke.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Incredible Desensitizing Candle
foods.description:
The bitter smokiness of a forest fire combined with the pleasant aroma of cooking meat.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Necrotic Summoning Candle
foods.description:
A wretched odor of lingering dissatistfaction and malaise.

This candle lasts for 5 minutes and any number of people can appreciate it. You can only deploy 1 candle at a time.

foods.name: Stimulating Wax
foods.description: An oily wax that smells great to bees. Used to help ensure mating success with bees or wasps. (To use, give to a pet bee or wasp via the Stable UI. The effect was last until the pet is used in a breeding attempt. A pet can only have one wax on at a time; using another wax replaces the first.)

foods.name: Impressive Aberration Skull
foods.description: The preserved skull of a particularly impressive sentient freakish creature.

foods.name: Astonishing Aberration Skull
foods.description: The preserved skull of an astonishingly impressive sentient freakish creature.

foods.name: Rough Tannin Powder
foods.description: A compound that contains tannic acid. It can be used to create shoddy and rough leather.

foods.name: Decent Tannin Powder
foods.description: A compound that contains tannic acid. It can be used to create crude and decent leather.

foods.name: Quality Tannin Powder
foods.description: A compound that contains tannic acid. It can be used to create nice and quality leather.

foods.name: Amazing Tannin Powder
foods.description: A compound that contains tannic acid. It can be used to create great and amazing leather.

foods.name: Awesome Tannin Powder
foods.description: A compound that contains tannic acid. It can be used to create astounding and awesome leather.

foods.name: Incredible Tannin Powder
foods.description: A compound that contains tannic acid. It can be used to create incredible and marvelous leather.

foods.name: Onyx
foods.description:
A small crystal made up of black and white bands. Used in magic, it guards against physical dangers.

Associated Primary Skill: Shield
Associated Secondary Skills: Armor Patching, Tanning, Leatherworking

foods.name: Sardonyx
foods.description:
This small gem is brownish orange. Used in magic, it provides extra courage or energy to someone under great stress.

Associated Primary Skill: Warden
Associated Secondary Skill: Tailoring

foods.name: Moss Agate
foods.description:
A white stone with dark green veins, the moss agate is also known as the Gardener's Talisman.

Associated Primary Skill: Hammer

Associated Secondary Skills: Gardening, Mycology

foods.name: Agate
foods.description:
This banded gem is used in magic to promote grace and give power to the body.

Associated Primary Skill: Unarmed

foods.name: Serpentine
foods.description:
A dull yellow-green stone. Used in magic, it can pierce the barrier between life and death.

Associated Primary Skill: Necromancy

foods.name: Diamond
foods.description: A scintillating gemstone. Used in magic, it can protect against death.

foods.name: Rabbit Malachite
foods.description: A pretty gem with dark green bands, it's well known for aiding magical communication. This particular gem has been infused with a rune that attunes it to rabbits when used in crafting.

foods.name: Maximized Onyx
foods.description: A small crystal made up of black and white bands. This particular gem has been tuned to act as an amplifier for certain leatherworking recipes.

foods.name: Maximized Massive Onyx
foods.description: A massive crystal made up of black and white bands. This particular gem has been tuned to act as an amplifier for certain leatherworking recipes.

foods.name: Massive Onyx
foods.description:
A chunky crystal made up of black and white bands. Used in magic, it guards against physical dangers.

Associated Primary Skill: Shield
Associated Secondary Skills: Armor Patching, Tanning, Leatherworking

foods.name: Massive Sardonyx
foods.description:
This large gem is brownish orange. Used in magic, it provides extra courage or energy to someone under great stress.

Associated Primary Skill: Warden
Associated Secondary Skill: Tailoring

foods.name: Massive Moss Agate
foods.description:
A white stone with dark green veins, the moss agate is also known as the Gardener's Talisman.

Associated Primary Skill: Hammer

Associated Secondary Skills: Gardening, Mycology

foods.name: Massive Agate
foods.description:
This big banded gem is used in magic to promote grace and give power to the body.

Associated Primary Skill: Unarmed

foods.name: Massive Serpentine
foods.description:
A big yellow-green stone. Used in magic, it can pierce the barrier between life and death.

Associated Primary Skill: Necromancy

foods.name: Massive Diamond
foods.description: A large scintillating gemstone. Used in magic, it can protect against death.

foods.name: Massive Rabbit Malachite
foods.description: A pretty big gem with dark green bands, it's well known for aiding magical communication. This particular gem has been infused with a rune that attunes it to rabbits when used in crafting.

foods.name: Demon Bean
foods.description: This bean has little prongs growing out of it that kind of look like horns.

foods.name: Salmpo Heart
foods.description: A rooty vegetable heart. Would probably be great in a salad.

foods.name: Unrefined Cranium Powder
foods.description: A small sack of foul-smelling white dust. Echur instructed you not to eat it, but that shouldn't be a problem.

foods.name: Giant Mushroom Sample
foods.description: A chunk of a weird giant mushroom. It reeks of death, and you're pretty sure it has no practical use.

foods.name: Praetor's Orders
foods.description: It's an official letter from Praetor Ballard, demanding that a Human named Charles Thompson leave Serbule's surroundings forever... or face death.

foods.name: Paul's Lucky Buckle
foods.description: It's a large, gaudy belt buckle with a hand-painted scene of a man chopping lumber.

foods.name: 'Leeka and the Blade Trials' Chapter 1
foods.description: A chapter from an adventure novel.

foods.name: 'Leeka and the Blade Trials' Chapter 2
foods.description: A chapter from an adventure novel.

foods.name: 'Leeka and the Blade Trials' Chapter 3
foods.description: A chapter from an adventure novel.

foods.name: 'Leeka and the Blade Trials' Chapter 4
foods.description: A chapter from an adventure novel.

foods.name: 'Leeka and the Blade Trials' Chapter 5
foods.description: A chapter from an adventure novel.

foods.name: 'Leeka and the Blade Trials' Chapter 6
foods.description: A chapter from an adventure novel.

foods.name: Bloodsoaker's Blood
foods.description: A drop of blood from a gnasher.

foods.name: Karnag's Imaginary Diploma
foods.description: It says, "Karnag, your family loves you. Please don't do this to yourself! There must be another way. You will miss your son's first words..." the rest is scribbled out except a bit at the bottom written in a different style, "Karnag Has Graduated Wizard School! Signed my mother."

foods.name: Troll's Lip Beer Keg
foods.description: A keg of Troll's Lip, one of the cheapest and vilest beers in all the Council Lands.

foods.name: Vurrkan's Heart
foods.description: The heart of a desert-living drakeworm.

foods.name: Water Sample Analyzer
foods.description: A magical bottle that analyzes water. Use it while standing in the center of a pool of water.

foods.name: Telka's Teeth (Clean Sample)
foods.description: A small vial that reeks of urine and other unpleasant chemicals. This is an unadulterated "pure" dose of the drug, straight from the alchemists' workbench.

foods.name: Stunned Rose-Mourning Butterfly
foods.description: A butterfly that's been captured alive. It doesn't look happy... but it's alive!

foods.name: Rose-Mourning Butterfly Net
foods.description: A net designed to catch and contain Rose-mourning butterflies. (Keep this in your inventory when harvesting the butterflies to capture them alive.)

foods.name: Sacrificial Snail Meat
foods.description: The heart of a massive snail.

foods.name: Scray Egg
foods.description: A recently-laid scray egg.

foods.name: Invasive Ice Fish
foods.description: A fae fish that's been genetically altered to survive here and slowly kill the ocean. It's cold to the touch, and quite inedible.

foods.name: Predatory Starfish
foods.description: Apparently this starfish is especially problematic to local fish.

foods.name: Stolen Wrapping
foods.description: This looks to be a piece of mummy wrapping.

foods.name: Swarmer Brain
foods.description: The brain of a swarmer demon.

foods.name: Demonic Flapskull Blood
foods.description: Blood, or at least some sort of blood-like ichor, extracted from the wings of a demonic flapskull.

foods.name: Demon Soldier Brain
foods.description: The brain of a demon soldier.

foods.name: Planar Planner (inaccurate)
foods.description: This notebook contains arcane sigils in a strange code.

foods.name: Planar Planner (accurate)
foods.description: This notebook contains arcane sigils in a strange code. The sage Elmetaph has scribbled out some of the sigils and written in new ones.

foods.name: Refined Hematic Platelets
foods.description: A sludgey liquid. The label suggests it's used in alchemy.

foods.name: Elongated Darkness (Faint)
foods.description: The label indicates that it's some sort of alchemical byproduct of "soul darkening", whatever that is.

foods.name: Fresh Thrall Blood
foods.description: Blood from a crazed vampire thrall, said to be especially tasty. (But tastes like blood to you.)

foods.name: Antique Blood Diffuser
foods.description: Used by vampires to "clean" blood so it can be used in alcoholic drinks. This one's antique.

foods.name: Orcish Collaboration Notes
foods.description: A series of notes and questions, written entirely in Orcish.

foods.name: Translated Collaboration Notes
foods.description: A series of notes and questions about a new type of mechanized ice fishing technique. Addressed to someone named "Swamp Dwarf".

foods.name: Scout Eyeball
foods.description: A plucked-out eyeball from a Demon Scout. Even in death, it gives you an eerie feeling of being watched.

foods.name: Justiciar Spinal Fluid
foods.description: Fluid that's been siphoned out of a Demon Justiciar's spine. It crackles with electricity.

foods.name: Infernal Animal Brain
foods.description: The brain of an ordinary animal that has been corrupted by demonic energy.

foods.name: Lesser Behemoth Brain
foods.description: The brain of a deceased demonic Behemoth, of the Lesser variety.

foods.name: Behemoth Brain
foods.description: The brain of a deceased demonic Behemoth.

foods.name: Overseer Brain
foods.description: The brain of a demonic Overseer. It is hot to the touch, and still pulsating.

foods.name: Justiciar Brain
foods.description: The brain of a demonic Justiciar. It shocks you every time you handle it.

foods.name: Tiny Wind Heart
foods.description: A tiny puff of animated air. Somehow it stays coherent.

foods.name: Soggy Little Wind Heart
foods.description: A tiny puff of humid air. Somehow it stays coherent.

foods.name: Bag of Stolen Jewelry
foods.description: A bag of elven jewelry.

foods.name: Bag of Stolen Jewelry
foods.description: A bag of elven jewelry.

foods.name: Thrice-Cursed Beak
foods.description: This beak is too cursed to be useful in most dark rituals.

foods.name: Hamilton's Notes
foods.description: A set of notes consisting of pig hoofprints.

foods.name: Bag of Stolen Jewelry
foods.description: A bag of elven jewelry.

foods.name: Bag of Stolen Jewelry
foods.description: A bag of elven jewelry.

foods.name: Bag of Stolen Jewelry
foods.description: A bag of elven jewelry.

foods.name: Notes on Statehelm Graveyard Rituals
foods.description: Notes from Fransesca Muradrake on how best to use the ritual spot in Statehelm's graveyard.

foods.name: Justin's Badge Collection
foods.description: It contains a bunch of little hand-made badges. They don't look valuable.

foods.name: Unguent Delivery
foods.description: A small amount of sludgy substance.

foods.name: Delivery for Sir Hughes
foods.description: It's an authentic rakshasa-style claw weapon.

foods.name: Vibrant Painclover
foods.description: A particularly vividly-colored painclover. It seems ... About as toxic as the usual kind.

foods.name: Bottle of Water
foods.description: This bottle is full of clean, delicious water. It can be drunk to recover a little energy, and has a million other uses.

foods.name: Prepared Fletchings
foods.description: A bundle of 1000 arrow fletchings for basic and advanced arrows.

foods.name: Grim Fletchings
foods.description: A bundle of 1000 arrow fletchings for marvelous and breathtaking arrows.

foods.name: Ice Fishing Gear (5 min)
foods.description: Use this to fish through the ice of a frozen lake. If the lake has Grapefish or Perch, this gear can catch them. Takes 5 minutes to attempt to catch 1 fish.

foods.name: Ice Fishing Gear (30 min)
foods.description: Use this to fish through the ice of a frozen lake. If the lake has Grapefish, Perch, or Eel, this gear can catch them. Takes 30 minutes to attempt to catch 2-5 fish.

foods.name: Ice Fishing Gear (2 hour)
foods.description: Use this to fish through the ice of a frozen lake. If the lake has Grapefish, Perch, Eel, or Shark, this gear can catch them. Takes 2 hours to attempt to catch 3-12 fish.

foods.name: Ice Fishing Gear (4 hour)
foods.description: Use this to fish through the ice of a frozen lake. If the lake has Grapefish, Perch, Eel, or Shark, this gear can catch them. Takes 4 hours to attempt to catch 5-20 fish.

foods.name: Ice Fishing Gear (8 hour)
foods.description: Use this to fish through the ice of a frozen lake. If the lake has Grapefish, Perch, Eel, or Shark, this gear can catch them. Takes 8 hours to attempt to catch 12-35 fish.

foods.name: Specialized Ice Fishing Gear (5 min)
foods.description: Use this to fish through the ice of a frozen lake. If the lake has Walleye or Rock Carp, this gear can catch them. Takes 5 minutes to attempt to catch 1 fish.

foods.name: Specialized Ice Fishing Gear (30 min)
foods.description: Use this to fish through the ice of a frozen lake. If the lake has Walleye, Rock Carp, or Smallmouth Bass, this gear can catch them. Takes 30 minutes to attempt to catch 2-5 fish.

foods.name: Specialized Ice Fishing Gear (2 hour)
foods.description: Use this to fish through the ice of a frozen lake. If the lake has Walleye, Rock Carp, Smallmouth Bass, or Yellow Perch, this gear can catch them. Takes 2 hours to attempt to catch 3-12 fish.

foods.name: Specialized Ice Fishing Gear (4 hour)
foods.description: Use this to fish through the ice of a frozen lake. If the lake has Walleye, Rock Carp, Smallmouth Bass, Yellow Perch, or Catfish, this gear can catch them. Takes 4 hours to attempt to catch 5-20 fish.

foods.name: Specialized Ice Fishing Gear (8 hour)
foods.description: Use this to fish through the ice of a frozen lake. If the lake has Walleye, Rock Carp, Smallmouth Bass, Yellow Perch, or Catfish, this gear can catch them. Takes 8 hours to attempt to catch 12-35 fish.

foods.description: A memento with some kind of important history tied to it. If you're knowledgeable enough, you can inspect it more closely for helpful clues.

foods.name: Inspected Forgotten Memento
foods.description:
An historic memento. You don't know what it means, but the right person will.

Use this item to receive a hint about which NPC can identify it. Find that NPC and Gift them this item to convert it into a Memory Note.

foods.name: Holiday Applejack
foods.description: Apple brandy, with a distinctive apple taste and a strong kick. A longtime favorite of rural humans.

foods.name: Dhakmar's Shoddy Tequila
foods.description: Fermented cactus juice with a complex taste. This batch is pretty vile, but barely drinkable.

foods.name: Dhakmar's Terrible Gin
foods.description: This is some of the worst gin ever. But it is technically not fatal to drink.

foods.name: Bootleg Troll Bourbon
foods.description: A favorite of conscripted trolls. The name 'bourbon' is a misnomer since no corn is used. You don't want to know what is used.

foods.name: Remga's Raging Rum
foods.description: A bottle of extraordinarily potent rum. It's supposedly made by enslaved fairies who are forced to generate magical sugar all day. This sugar when fermented raises the alcohol percentage well above 100%, much to the chagrin of everyone trying to comprehend what that could possibly mean.

foods.name: Psychic Cricket
foods.description: A mantis invention: watered-down gin, fruit-flavored rum, and 'secret flavorings' which are probably just mint. A casino favorite! ... because it's usually free. (This mixed drink is treated as a beer/wine.)

foods.name: Basic Lager
foods.description: A simple, watery, slightly insipid beer.

foods.name: Pale Ale
foods.description: A surprisingly complex beer, but... complexity doesn't always taste good.

foods.name: Marzen
foods.description: A medium-body beer with a malty flavor.

foods.name: Goblin Ale
foods.description: A hoppy beer with hints of spice.

foods.name: Orcish Bock
foods.description: A clean, dry beer that goes down easy.

foods.name: Brown Ale
foods.description: A sweet beer with hints of chocolate.

foods.name: Dwarven Stout
foods.description: A strong dark beer that packs a punch. The preferred socialization drink of dwarves.

foods.name: Pilsner
foods.description: A golden beer with a slightly bitter taste.

foods.name: Porter
foods.description: A pleasant beer that strongly takes on the characteristics of its flavoring ingredients.

foods.description: A simple, watery, slightly insipid beer.

foods.name: Pale Ale Keg

foods.name: Potato Vodka
foods.description: A very rough alcoholic beverage. Some say you grow to like the taste, but others say that's just your tastebuds dying from the pain.

foods.name: Applejack
foods.description: Apple brandy, with a distinctive apple taste and a strong kick. A longtime favorite of rural humans.

foods.name: Beet Vodka
foods.description: A sweet, relatively palatable variety of vodka. Although it's a traditional dwarven drink, it long ago fell out of favor, and these days dwarves only use it for cooking.

foods.name: Pale Rum
foods.description: Sweet and strong, with the distinctive odor of molasses. In far-off lands, ranalon produce and drink rum in tremendous quantities, but it's less common -- and less delicious -- in Alharth.

foods.name: Whisky
foods.description: A simple variety of whisky made from barley. It's drinkable and has a tolerable flavor.

foods.name: Tequila
foods.description: Fermented cactus juice with a complex taste. This variety has been aged to make it more drinkable. (It's "more" drinkable, but still not "very" drinkable -- it's an acquired taste.) The stereotypical drink of rakshasa desert bandits.

foods.name: Dry Gin
foods.description: Pleasant, slightly citrusy, but with a distinctive bitterness too. It's said to be the favorite hard liquor of elves, but since elves mostly drink wine, that's not much praise.

foods.name: Bourbon
foods.description: Made from fermented corn mash, this is very mellow and drinkable. This is the favored drink of Councilwoman Sereel "The Steel" Avenbule. She holds a bourbon competition each year in Vidaria.

foods.name: Cider
foods.description: This variety of cider is made from sour apples and has a complex array of taste sensations. Pity you won't remember the taste after blacking out from it...

foods.name: Orange Wine
foods.description: With notes of citrus and sweetness, this is a decent table wine.

foods.name: Banana Wine
foods.description: A buttery, banana-flavored wine that's quite a mouthful.

foods.name: Pear Wine
foods.description: A pleasant dessert wine.

foods.name: Rice Wine
foods.description: A very dry wine that's quite drinkable.

foods.name: Juniper Wine
foods.description: A dry wine. It has a slightly piney smell, but the aroma is not pleasant.

foods.name: Mulberry Wine
foods.description: A surprisingly fruity dark wine.

foods.name: Cantaloupe Wine
foods.description: A refreshing summer wine. When prepared by a master brewer, this is the perfect outdoor party wine.

foods.name: Cranberry Wine
foods.description: A delicious seasonal wine.

foods.name: Pyrite
foods.description: A chunk of fool's gold. It has many alchemical uses, and is great for making costume jewelry. It is often used in formulas that augment jewelry.

foods.name: Iridium
foods.description: A chunk of dense (yet brittle) iridium. It's used in the creation of acid-proof armor and strange robotic constructs. It can also be used to augment jewelry.

foods.name: Cerberus Tear
foods.description: A weird mineral found near the rubywall crystals; the origin is completely unknown, and the name seems to be a misnomer.

foods.name: Thin Mesh Grate
foods.description: A small thin piece of metal covered in a grid of holes. It is used by flower arrangers.

foods.name: Mesh Grate
foods.description: A piece of metal covered in a grid of holes. It is used by flower arrangers.

foods.name: Thick Mesh Grate
foods.description: A small but thick piece of metal covered in a grid of holes. It is used by flower arrangers.

foods.description: A poor rendition of a gryphon. This will not impress anyone, but making it was good practice. Lasts for 5 minutes once deployed.

foods.name: Shoddy Dragon Statue

foods.name: Small Gryphon Statue

foods.name: Goblin Orders
foods.description: Some writing in goblin. It looks like instructions or directions, maybe?

foods.name: Translated Builder Instructions
foods.description: This is a work-order from a goblin chieftan to a goblin mason guild detailing a home expansion. It's terribly interesting.

foods.name: Translated Battle Plan
foods.description: This is an old battle plan for some intra-goblin skirmish. It might be worth something to somebody... but probably not much in any case.

foods.name: Translated Goblin Poetry
foods.description: This is sloppily transliterated goblin poetry. It scans poorly, the similes make no sense after translation, and the topic of the poem is toenails. But it is poetry, technically.

foods.name: Racing Medal: Leaping
foods.description:
Attaching this medal to your gear will boost your mount's jumping capability during races.

This item is attached to Reins or a Saddle via a recipe. Using this item will teach you the recipe if necessary.

foods.name: Racing Medal: Bravery

Attaching this medal to your gear will make your mount slightly braver during races.

This item is attached to Reins or a Saddle via a recipe. Using this item will teach you the recipe if necessary.

foods.name: Ciervos's Anklets
foods.description: The evil creature Ciervos wore these for thousands of years. Must be lucky! Hmm, but he died wearing them. Maybe they're unlucky...

foods.name: Yeti Stockings
foods.description: Thick matted hair combined with spider silk. These feel great. No, really. They don't look great, but they feel great.

foods.name: Fungus-Man Footwraps
foods.description: A thick layer of fungal "skin" peeled off of a dead fungus-man.

foods.name: Ciervos's Anklets
foods.description: The evil creature Ciervos wore these for thousands of years. Must be lucky! Hmm, but he died wearing them. Maybe they're unlucky...

foods.name: The Servant's Walkers
foods.description: Created in homage to an unknown god or king. They are inscribed with the phrase "Be quick, my servant! Time is fleeting!"

foods.name: Justice Trekkers
foods.description: Etched with the symbols of Dreva and carved of an unknown wood, these animal shoes radiate authority over nature. Only a cow, pure of heart, could wear these.

foods.name: Basic Ink
foods.description: Some basic calligraphy ink.

foods.name: Advanced Ink
foods.description: Very fancy calligraphy ink.

foods.name: Long Stockings
foods.description: These are just cotton underclothes, but they're really well made!

foods.name: Orcish Greaves
foods.description: Leather armor with a thin layer of strong metal inside.

foods.name: Expert Ink
foods.description: Super fancy calligraphy ink.

foods.name: Amazing Ink
foods.description: Extremely fancy calligraphy ink.

foods.name: Astounding Ink
foods.description: Very extremely fancy calligraphy ink.

foods.name: Incredible Ink
foods.description: Incredibly fancy calligraphy ink.

foods.name: Breathtaking Ink
foods.description: This is damned good calligraphy ink.

foods.name: Ink Remover
foods.description: A potent acid for removing inscriptions on items.

foods.name: Thentree Skirt
foods.description: The isolated elf colony of Sedgewick Forest prefers armor of this type because it reminds them of their home in Verta. It's been explained to them that nobody in Verta dresses this way anymore, but they don't seem to care. An outdated version of the Symbol of Arisetsu can be found on the front.

foods.name: Orcish Military Greaves
foods.description: It's unclear what sort of leather was used in these greaves, but it's not cow leather. Something thicker.

foods.name: Wonkman's Beefcake Pantihose
foods.description: The... err... "backside" of these sturdy leather pants doesn't seem to be part of the original design. Some previous owner has sewn in a thick leather square to ensure full body coverage.

foods.name: Orcish Wheat Grinder
foods.description: A delicate tool for grinding orcish wheat into flour. (Using this item will teach the recipe if needed.)

foods.name: Goblin Breastplate
foods.description: Strong enough for a Human, but made for a Goblin. By slaves who toil in very poor working conditions.

foods.name: Lawara's Mangled Platemail
foods.description: Lawara the amnesiac was wearing this when she first awoke. It clearly used to be something special, but now it's barely holding together.

foods.name: Corroded Breastplate
foods.description: Rust damage has taken a heavy toll on this breastplate. It's still functional, but you'll probably get rust stains all over yourself.

foods.name: Spider-Worn Coat
foods.description: Somehow this breastplate got stuck onto a spider via sticky web! What are the odds? Unfortunately, spider acid has filled it with holes, but what a great story!

foods.name: Hunter's Breastplate
foods.description: This breastplate is very old, and a sequence of enchantments has been laid atop it to protect it from the elements. An active symbol of Arisetsu is barely visible under layers of rust and paint.

foods.name: Orcish Coat
foods.description: This tough leather armor is interwoven with magical threads that supposedly keep psionic attacks at bay.

foods.name: Dwarven Soldier Breastplate
foods.description: When the dwarves were holed up under Serbule so many centuries ago, they didn't have a lot to do but make really resilient armor. The resiliency magic bleeds over to the wearer.

foods.name: Stalwart Breastplate
foods.description: This thick and ungainly thing was the preferred armor of the ancient Dwarven Stalwarts. It's easy to see why: this armor is very... stalwart.

foods.name: Rakshasian Elite Coat
foods.description: This is the latest masterpiece of rakshasa leatherworking, designed to replace the old Ravana armor they can no longer create. In many ways, this surpasses anything from their homeworld, a testament to rakshasa skill... and the toughness of beasts in Alharth.

foods.name: Thentree Harness
foods.description: The isolated elf colony of Sedgewick Forest prefers armor of this type because it reminds them of their home in Verta. It's been explained to them that nobody in Verta dresses this way anymore, but they don't seem to care. A symbol of Arisetsu is painted onto the front.

foods.name: Insulated Coat
foods.description: It's gotten a bit frayed from use, but it's still thick and warm.

foods.name: Orcish Military Coat
foods.description: It's seen years of freezing cold weather, digging in the dirt, and horrific violence. It's surprisingly clean for all that.

foods.name: Hand-Picked Dwarven Plate Coat
foods.description: An expert armor seller decided this coat was special.

foods.name: "Povus Special" Overcoat
foods.description: Crafted by skilled rakshasa armorsmiths prior to the desolation of Povus.

foods.name: James Eltibule's Breastplate
foods.description: Brand new, but of an old dwarven design. The lack of fire-retardant is a problem with this sort of gear, but otherwise it's quite impressive.

foods.name: Great Winter Coat
foods.description: When winter comes and you need a great coat, now you have one. During summer, though, this is a "nice" coat. At best.

foods.name: Crude Spider Casing
foods.description: Pieces of chitin and metal are sewn into reinforced webbing to create a suit for spiders.

foods.name: Decent Spider Casing
foods.description: Pieces of chitin and metal are sewn into reinforced webbing to create a suit for spiders.

foods.name: Nice Spider Casing
foods.description: Pieces of chitin and strong metal are sewn into reinforced webbing to create a powerful armor suit for spiders.

foods.name: Astounding Ri-Shin Coat
foods.description: Some of the best plant-based cold-weather gear you may ever see. Comfortable and safe.

foods.name: Awesome Ri-Shin Coat
foods.description: You never expected that cold-weather gear made from bits and bobs of nature would work so well.

foods.name: Shoddy Chainmail Coat
foods.description: Featuring embarrassingly bad chainwork!

foods.name: Quality Dwarven Plate Coat
foods.description: Bulky but extremely strong, especially against oversized opponents.

foods.name: Great Dwarven Plate Coat
foods.description: Bulky but extremely strong, especially against oversized opponents.

foods.name: Quality Orcish Plate Coat
foods.description: The preferred style of orcish armor for front-line fighters.

foods.name: Goblin Fist Wraps
foods.description: Protects your hands so well that you can even punch harder than before.

foods.name: Gauntlets of the Summer Court
foods.description: Oddly warm to the touch, even in cold weather, these makeshift Summer Court gloves protect from frostbite.

foods.name: Snowblood Misery Trooper Gauntlets
foods.description: Horrendously strong, but not especially deft.

foods.name: Death Trooper Gauntlets
foods.description: This red-tinted armor is worn by Gazluk City's front-line soldiers, known as "Death Troopers". Their armor enhances their strength and melee prowess.

foods.name: Misery Trooper Gauntlets
foods.description: This blue-tinted armor is worn by Gazluk City's support soldiers, known as "Misery Troopers". Their armor is strong while also providing survival protection in harsh weather.

foods.name: Goblin Fist Wraps
foods.description: Protects your hands so well that you can even punch harder than before.

foods.name: Fungus-Man Handwraps
foods.description: The fleshy part of a fungus-man's hand, worn as a glove.

foods.name: Flanged Helm
foods.description: A fairly basic helmet with some unnecessary stylistic flourishes.

foods.name: Ugly Helm
foods.description: Truth in advertising: this is not a pretty helmet. It has other charms, though, such as a deep-seated aroma of spoiled cheese.

foods.name: Orcish Cap
foods.description: For orcs that rely on speed and stealth to survive, this leather helmet is the standard. It's not really the best possible cap, but standards usually aren't.

foods.name: Quality Bard Cap
foods.description: A jaunty cap with a crowd-pleasing feather. Carefully sculpted to look great, yet give maximum visibility so you aren't caught off-guard.

foods.name: Great Bard Cap
foods.description: A jaunty cap with a crowd-pleasing feather. Carefully sculpted to look great, yet give maximum visibility so you aren't caught off-guard.

foods.name: Amazing Bard Cap
foods.description: A jaunty cap with a crowd-pleasing feather. Carefully sculpted to look great, yet give maximum visibility so you aren't caught off-guard.

foods.name: Astounding Bard Cap
foods.description: A jaunty cap with a crowd-pleasing feather. Carefully sculpted to look great, yet give maximum visibility so you aren't caught off-guard.

foods.name: Awesome Bard Cap
foods.description: A jaunty cap with a crowd-pleasing feather. Carefully sculpted to look great, yet give maximum visibility so you aren't caught off-guard.

foods.name: Incredible Bard Cap
foods.description: A jaunty cap with a crowd-pleasing feather. Carefully sculpted to look great, yet give maximum visibility so you aren't caught off-guard.

foods.name: Marvelous Bard Cap
foods.description: A jaunty cap with a crowd-pleasing feather. Carefully sculpted to look great, yet give maximum visibility so you aren't caught off-guard.

foods.name: Orcish Gladiator Cap
foods.description: This ugly leather thing is supposed to be worn on the head, apparently.

foods.name: Desert Vagabond Cap
foods.description: Worn leather with metal meticulously inserted into it. Whoever made this lacked skill in leatherworking, but made up for it with time and attention to detail.

foods.name: Rakshasian Elite Helm
foods.description: This is the latest masterpiece of rakshasa leatherworking, designed to replace the old Ravana armor they can no longer create. In many ways, this surpasses anything from their homeworld, a testament to rakshasa skill... and the toughness of beasts in Alharth.

foods.name: Decent Cow Champron
foods.description: Hammered together from simple materials, for a simple battle cow.

foods.name: Nice Cow Champron
foods.description: A better-made helmet for a better-made bovine.

foods.name: Quality Cow Champron
foods.description: Hammered and polished and ready for battle.

foods.name: Great Cow Champron
foods.description: Hammered and polished and ready for battle.

foods.name: Amazing Cow Champron
foods.description: Hammered and polished and ready for battle.

foods.name: Astounding Cow Champron
foods.description: Hammered and polished and ready for battle.

foods.description: Hammered and polished and ready for battle.

foods.name: Incredible Cow Champron
foods.description: Hammered and polished and ready for battle.

foods.name: Marvelous Cow Champron
foods.description: Hammered and polished and ready for battle.

foods.name: Shoddy Werewolf Champron
foods.description: It's metal. It fits on a werewolf. These are the only positive attributes.

foods.name: Rough Werewolf Champron
foods.description: It's metal. It fits on a werewolf. These are the only positive attributes.

foods.name: Crude Werewolf Champron
foods.description: It's metal. It fits on a werewolf. These are the only positive attributes.

foods.name: Decent Werewolf Champron
foods.description: A reasonable-looking metal helm for a werewolf.

foods.name: Nice Werewolf Champron
foods.description: Quite a nice werewolf helm.

foods.name: Quality Werewolf Champron
foods.description: Quite a nice werewolf helm.

foods.name: Great Werewolf Champron
foods.description: Quite a nice werewolf helm.

foods.name: Amazing Werewolf Champron
foods.description: Quite a nice werewolf helm.

foods.description: Quite a nice werewolf helm.

foods.name: Incredible Werewolf Champron
foods.description: Quite a nice werewolf helm.

foods.name: Marvelous Werewolf Champron
foods.description: Quite a nice werewolf helm.

foods.name: Insulated Hood
foods.description: Warm, warm, warm. A little smelly. But warm!

foods.name: Alicorn
foods.description: The horn of a deceased unicorn. Alicorns have many medicinal uses, but in the right hooves, they have formidable combat uses as well. This particular alicorn looks like it would fit on a deer's head quite nicely, bonding to the skull and enhancing their abilities.

foods.name: Dark Alicorn
foods.description: The horn of a unicorn, enhanced with some sort of dark metal. It looks like it would fit on a deer's head, bonding to the skull and enhancing their abilities.

foods.name: Ratkin Revolutionist Cowl
foods.description: Once used by ratkin guerillas, these cowls were later repurposed for cheese-storage, then un-purposed for that and re-repurposed as armor. As a result they smell a lot like cheese, which the ratkin consider a feature.

foods.name: Council Pathfinder Helm
foods.description: This helmet was crafted by orcs, but was intended to be worn by both orcs and humans. The quality is excellent, but the most interesting feature is definitely the custom ear guard: the creators apparently believed that human ears are especially vulnerable, so they provided special removable padding to give them extra security. No-one knows why the orcs felt this was necessary, and the decision is somewhat troubling.

foods.name: Ursula's Ri-Shin Gift
foods.description: Apparently intended to be a gift to Ursula's mother, this cowl is very poorly made and offers no real protection. It has been enchanted with an apprentice-level spell that would normally not be very effective, but the enchantment has been repeated thousands of times over many years, and this has somehow cohered into a decent level of magic.

foods.name: James Eltibule's Helm
foods.description: While doubtlessly dwarven in design, this helmet seems light. There is extra insulation against cold.

foods.name: Shoddy Familiar Controller
foods.description: It's a metal headband designed for a small animal. Mages uses these to control unruly familiars after Awakening them, and also to augment the animals' burgeoning magic powers. This particular control ring allows hares to use ice magic -- as long as the hare has already learned the rituals, of course.

This particular control ring allows hares to use ice magic -- as long as the hare has already learned the rituals, of course.

foods.name: Snowblood Misery Trooper Helm
foods.description: An insulated helmet that is as frightening as it is protective.

foods.name: Death Trooper Helm
foods.description: This red-tinted armor is worn by Gazluk City's front-line soldiers, known as "Death Troopers". Their armor enhances their strength and melee prowess.

foods.name: Misery Trooper Helm
foods.description: This blue-tinted armor is worn by Gazluk City's support soldiers, known as "Misery Troopers". Their armor is strong while also providing survival protection in harsh weather.

foods.name: Butcher Knife
foods.description: A large knife for cutting meat and organs out of corpses. (Keep it in your inventory and you'll have the option to butcher the corpses of some enemies.)

foods.name: Organ Knife
foods.description: A large knife for cutting meat and organs out of corpses (+5% chance for an organ). (Keep it in your inventory and you'll have the option to butcher the corpses of some enemies.)

foods.name: Filleting Knife
foods.description: A large knife for cutting meat and organs out of corpses (+5 to your effective skill when Butchering). (Keep it in your inventory and you'll have the option to butcher the corpses of some enemies.)

foods.name: Wind Crawler's Webs
foods.description: A mass of enchanted webbing from a gigantic wind spider. It can be worn as a makeshift hat by the insane.

foods.name: "Povus Special" Coif
foods.description: These coifs used to be mass-produced for sale to Statehelm, but the attack on Povus killed most of the town's smiths.

foods.name: Yogzi's Butcher Knife
foods.description: Yogzi created this convenient butcher knife that can also extract skulls. (+3 to your effective skill when Butchering or Extracting Skulls). (Keep it in your inventory and you'll be given the option to butcher and/or extract the skull of some enemies.)

foods.name: Amutasa's Organ Knife
foods.description: A large knife for cutting meat and organs out of corpses (+7% chance for an organ). (Keep it in your inventory and you'll have the option to butcher the corpses of some enemies.)

foods.name: Ice Butcher Knife
foods.description: A large knife for cutting meat and organs out of corpses. It's made of magical ice. (Keep it in your inventory and you'll have the option to butcher the corpses of some enemies.)

foods.name: Quality Chainmail Coif
foods.description: This coif features precision chainwork and a clever pattern that keeps the wearer's vision-lines clear.

foods.name: Quality Dwarven Plate Helm
foods.description: Heavy but not unwieldy, this style of helmet provides extra protection against massive opponents.

foods.name: Great Dwarven Plate Helm
foods.description: Heavy but not unwieldy, this style of helmet provides extra protection against massive opponents.

foods.name: Amazing Dwarven Plate Helm
foods.description: Heavy but not unwieldy, this style of helmet provides extra protection against massive opponents.

foods.name: Marvelous Dwarven Plate Helm
foods.description: Heavy but not unwieldy, this style of helmet provides extra protection against massive opponents.

foods.name: Quality Orcish Plate Helm
foods.description: More ornate than most orcish armor, this helm is worn with pride by countless elite orcs.

foods.name: Great Orcish Plate Helm
foods.description: More ornate than most orcish armor, this helm is worn with pride by countless elite orcs.

foods.name: Amazing Orcish Plate Helm
foods.description: More ornate than most orcish armor, this helm is worn with pride by countless elite orcs.

foods.name: Marvelous Orcish Plate Helm
foods.description: More ornate than most orcish armor, this helm is worn with pride by countless elite orcs.

foods.name: Freezing Blade
foods.description: Enchanted with cold magic, this weapon is uncomfortable to hold at first, but after a while your hand goes numb and it stops being so bothersome... as long as you don't need to use your hand in combat for anything else.

foods.name: Controller's Stiletto
foods.description: Supposedly coated in blood from over 100 different sacrificed creatures, this knife emanates hatred and can lead to unwanted thoughts of murder. A necromancy gem is embedded in the hilt.

foods.name: Autofreeze Knife
foods.description: When held, this weapon seems to freeze the very air around it. A weapon of elite Winter Court troops.

foods.name: Karamasha's Fishing Knife
foods.description: An exotic filleting tool, only for fishing experts.

foods.name: Autofreeze Shiv
foods.description: Wielded by the more sinister variety of Winter Court fae assassins, this shiv freezes everything it touches.

foods.name: Xiphos
foods.description: Each orc is given a xiphos upon their attainment of adulthood. Made of cold iron, it has a broad blade that slightly favors strength over finesse.

foods.name: Gouging Stiletto
foods.description: This goblin-made weapon uses a manticore tail as a powerful injector. It's not a very good sword, but it's a great poisoning tool.

foods.name: Orcish Spatha
foods.description: Made for orcish armies by dwarven smiths under an ancient treaty.

foods.name: Fiendish Rapier
foods.description: An evil weapon forged in a dark fire. A necromancy gem rests in the hilt like a gaudy bauble.

foods.name: Fae Rapier
foods.description: An extraordinarily light weapon. The entire blade weighs less than the gaudy gem in the hilt.

foods.name: Rapier Wit
foods.description: A Veilmoor clan promotional weapon. The blade psychically screams on contact with enemies.

foods.name: "Povus Special" Lute
foods.description: A rebranded lute that was actually made in Rahu.

foods.name: Meat Tenderizer
foods.description: A customized hammer used by chefs.

foods.name: Velkort's Hand-Me-Down
foods.description: An inscription in Elven reads "To my lovely Velkort, thanks for a great evening."

foods.name: Sun Warden
foods.description: Inscribed with ancient rakshasa runes, this staff taps magic from another world, making it quite hot. A recent owner also attuned it to Arisetsu, further heating it to the point that wielding the staff is a bit painful.

foods.name: Sacred Guardian Trident
foods.description:
The traditional weapon of Ranalon Guardians. This model has a great heft and has been augmented with some common ranalon magics.
Note: this weapon is considered a Staff.

foods.name: Fairy Dust
foods.description: A handful of magical essence from the fairy dimension. It is used in many fairy creation techniques and can also be consumed directly to restore health and wing luster. (Note: fairy dust is extremely toxic to mortals and should never be consumed by non-fae!)

foods.name: Simple Skull Ritual-Powder
foods.description:
Powdered skull dust for use in consecrating items or places. Harukita, the god of Hate, and Kajich, the god of Fear, both appreciate this sort of thing.

(You can turn this special bone-meal into ordinary bone-meal by right-clicking the item.)

foods.name: Basic Skull Ritual-Powder
foods.description:
Powdered skull dust for use in consecrating items or places. Harukita, the god of Hate, and Kajich, the god of Fear, both appreciate this sort of thing.

(You can turn this special bone-meal into ordinary bone-meal by right-clicking the item.)

foods.name: Good Skull Ritual-Powder
foods.description:
Powdered skull dust for use in consecrating items or places. Harukita, the god of Hate, and Kajich, the god of Fear, both appreciate this sort of thing.

(You can turn this special bone-meal into ordinary bone-meal by right-clicking the item.)

foods.name: Necromancy Test Medallion
foods.description: A figurine of a grinning skull. But, of course, all skulls grin. A necromancy gem is in the eye socket.

foods.name: Tidal's Circlet
foods.description: Made of blackened metal and etched with demonic runes.

foods.name: Soothing Medallion
foods.description: An expensive necklace with a well-cut magic tourmaline. This type of necklace is often used by people who fear they are in danger of having a psychotic break, although it can only hold off the inevitable for a little while.

foods.name: Claudia's Pouch
foods.description: A small bag of something tied with a cord. You can't tell what's in the bag because it's frozen completely solid, and it seems impervious to any form of heat.

foods.name: Gutsaver Medallion
foods.description: Designed to let you drink longer without unfortunate gastrointestinal issues.

foods.name: 'Treatment of The Poor'
foods.description: Created by the famed elven jeweler Sharra, this necklace supposedly reflects the wearer's treatment of the poor. It doesn't seem to do anything like that, but nobody has been brave enough to ask Sharra what's up.

foods.name: Tast Pendant
foods.description: This thin chain features an onyx figurine of an orc on a horse. Orcish rituals have attuned it to several gods, including Tast, Arisetsu, and Akhisa.

foods.name: Shoddy Kajich Medallion
foods.description: A gaudy necklace worn by those that venerate Kajich, the God of Fear. It allows you to invoke his visage to strike fear in your foes.

foods.name: Rough Kajich Medallion
foods.description: A gaudy necklace worn by those that venerate Kajich, the God of Fear. It allows you to invoke his visage to strike fear in your foes.

foods.name: Crude Kajich Medallion
foods.description: A gaudy necklace worn by those that venerate Kajich, the God of Fear. It allows you to invoke his visage to strike fear in your foes.

foods.name: Shoddy Arisetsu Medallion
foods.description: A necklace depicting the warm sun, one of the symbols of Arisetsu.

foods.name: Rough Arisetsu Medallion
foods.description: A necklace depicting the warm sun, one of the symbols of Arisetsu.

foods.name: Crude Arisetsu Medallion
foods.description: A necklace depicting the warm sun, one of the symbols of Arisetsu.

foods.name: Decent Arisetsu Medallion
foods.description: A necklace depicting the warm sun, one of the symbols of Arisetsu.

foods.name: Nice Arisetsu Medallion
foods.description: A necklace depicting the warm sun, one of the symbols of Arisetsu.

foods.name: Quality Arisetsu Medallion
foods.description: A necklace depicting the warm sun, one of the symbols of Arisetsu.

foods.name: Great Arisetsu Medallion
foods.description: A necklace depicting the warm sun, one of the symbols of Arisetsu.

foods.name: Ratkin Medallion
foods.description: A hunk of glass on a string. It's nothing to look at, but obviously enchanted.

foods.name: Battle Priest's Medallion
foods.description: A necklace depicting the warm sun, one of the symbols of Arisetsu. This variety was mass-produced for use by Council priests, and was probably lost during the War of Rahu.

foods.name: Pickles' Protective Collar
foods.description: Worn by a sentient panther for years. Its strong protective magic overshadows the smell of blood soaked into the collar.

foods.name: Amphibian Medallion
foods.description: Worn by ranalon to help protect their sensitive skin from environmental harm.

foods.name: Tidal's Circlet
foods.description: Made of blackened metal and etched with demonic runes.

foods.name: Ungulate Genetics Analyzer
foods.description: A terrifyingly complex device that can analyze the secret codes buried deep inside certain creatures. Warning: many cultures consider genetics study to be taboo. (Geneticists can keep this in inventory to be offered the option to gene-analyze this type of creature. There is a 5% chance that the device will break when used.)

foods.name: Beginner's Ungulate Genetics Analyzer
foods.description: A terrifyingly complex device that can analyze the secret codes buried deep inside certain creatures. This model is especially easy to use. Warning: many cultures consider genetics study to be taboo. (Geneticists can keep this in inventory to be offered the option to gene-analyze this type of creature. There is a 5% chance that the device will break when used.)

foods.name: Expert's Whittling Knife
foods.description: A great whittling knife for expert whittlers.

foods.name: Empty Classic Wine Bottle
foods.description: A fancy bottle makes wine taste better, and this is a pretty fancy bottle.

foods.name: Empty Bucket
foods.description: There's nothing in this bucket.

foods.name: Flour
foods.description: Low-quality wheat flour, but cheap and abundant.

foods.name: Wing Tassels of Beefriending
foods.description: Designed to be clipped to a fairy's wings, these tassels exude a pheromone that makes many types of bees and wasps non-aggressive (unless attacked).

foods.name: Bat Reduction Talisman
foods.description: A talisman that clips behind a giant bat's ear, making it much smaller and hence less terrifying to some individuals.

foods.name: Bottle of Sugar Water
foods.description: This bottle is full of sugary water.

foods.name: Venison
foods.description: A chunk of raw deer meat.

foods.name: Pork Shoulder
foods.description: A chunk of raw pig meat.

foods.name: Goblin Wheatbread
foods.description: Crusty goblin bread that stays edible and nutritious for months, though it should be noted that it never tastes good, even when fresh.

foods.name: Mogyar Cheese
foods.description:
A white-mold cheese with a pasty and nutty flavor.

Cheese Type: White

foods.name: Bottle of Milk
foods.description: This bottle is full of cow's milk. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Butter
foods.description: Smooth, luscious yellow butter.

foods.name: Mild Cheddar Cheese
foods.description:
A very basic mild cheddar cheese.

Cheese Type: Semi-Hard (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Sweet Butter
foods.description: Smooth, luscious yellow butter with a strong sweet undercurrent. Perfect for elven pastries!

foods.name: Raw Chicken
foods.description: A plucked chicken.

foods.name: Bottle of Sweet Whey
foods.description: This bottle contains the sweet runoff of the cheese-making process.

foods.name: Mutton
foods.description: Raw sheep meat.

foods.name: Peppercorns
foods.description: A handful of fresh peppercorns.

foods.name: Muntok Peppercorns
foods.description: A handful of fresh peppercorns.

foods.name: Cheap Meat (Legacy)
foods.description:
A cut of meat from a wild creature that's not normally used for food. The meat is low-quality but still useful in many dishes.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Great Mutton
foods.description: High-quality sheep meat.

foods.name: Steak
foods.description: A big chunk of cow meat.

foods.name: Cinnamon
foods.description: Dried "sticks" of cinnamon, perfect for spicing many dishes.

foods.name: Cactus Juice
foods.description: Freshly-squeezed liquid out of a cactus.

foods.name: Raw Paralytic Chicken
foods.description: Chicken meat that causes mild paralysis when eaten. An extremely exotic ingredient in food, but a common ingredient in poisons.

foods.name: Sinewy Cat Meat
foods.description:
This cat meat might be fresh. Or it might not be. It's so gross that it'd be hard to tell the difference.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Cat Meat
foods.description:
Cat meat is never particularly tasty, but this is ... edible.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Robust Cat Meat
foods.description:
If cat meat tasted good, this would taste good.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Sinewy Dog Meat
foods.description:
An unimpressive dog-like creature yielded this unimpressive "meat".

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Dog Meat
foods.description:
It's dog meat, but at least the dog was probably healthy.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Robust Dog Meat
foods.description:
Dog meat is an acquired taste, but at least this particular cut looks fresh and juicy.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Sinewy Dinosaur Meat
foods.description:
A small and unimpressive dinosaur yielded this gross thing.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Dinosaur Meat
foods.description:
It looks... edible. Huh.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Robust Dinosaur Meat
foods.description:
A hardy beast yielded this reasonably-appetizing-looking cut.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Sinewy Beast Meat
foods.description:
A mangy, possibly-diseased beast yielded this mangy, possibly-diseased meat. Mmm.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Beast Meat
foods.description:
This is a well-cut piece of crappy meat.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Robust Beast Meat
foods.description:
A large and bloody cut from a dangerous beast. Pity the meat doesn't look especially tasty.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Sinewy Insect Meat
foods.description:
This might technically be edible, but the stench is almost unbearable.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Insect Meat
foods.description:
This would be presentable if you were very clever with the presentation.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Robust Insect Meat
foods.description:
A hardy slab of insect meat. Good for dishes where the meat isn't the centerpiece.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Egg
foods.description: A bird egg. Looks edible.

foods.name: Weird Egg
foods.description: A large odd egg. Edible if properly prepared.

foods.name: Rabbit Meat
foods.description: The meat of a large-sized rabbit. (Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Great Rabbit Meat
foods.description: An exceptional piece of meat from a rabbit or hare.

foods.name: Basic Vinegar
foods.description: Very basic vinegar used in simple dishes.

foods.name: Fancy Vinegar
foods.description: Vinegar infused with a secret blend of spices.

foods.name: Expert's Vinegar
foods.description: This vinegar infusion is only needed in the fanciest of dishes.

foods.name: Honey
foods.description: A bottle of honey.

foods.name: Almonds
foods.description: A handful of nuts.

foods.name: Molasses
foods.description: Sweet sugarcane molasses, useful for cooking or making alcohol.

foods.name: Great Venison
foods.description: An exceptional piece of meat from a deer.

foods.name: Great Steak
foods.description: An exceptional piece of meat from a cow or bull.

foods.name: Amazing Venison
foods.description: An exceptional piece of meat from a deer.

foods.name: Amazing Steak
foods.description: An exceptional piece of meat from a cow or bull. (Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Amazing Rabbit Meat
foods.description: An exceptional piece of meat from a rabbit or hare. (Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Great Pork Shoulder
foods.description: A chunk of raw boar meat from an impressive animal.

foods.name: Raw Great Chicken
foods.description: An especially flavorful chicken, ready for cooking.

foods.name: Watercress
foods.description: An edible plant with a spicy and slightly bitter flavor.

foods.name: Bottle of Brine
foods.description: This bottle contains salty water made via a secret ranalon technique. It's used as a marinade and pickling agent.

foods.name: Dill
foods.description: A spice with a bitter, fennely taste.

foods.name: Bottle of Goat Milk
foods.description: This bottle is full of goat's milk. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Fairy Honey
foods.description: A bottle of fairy honey, said to be more delicious than mortals can bear to taste. That's just hyperbole, but it's definitely an extremely rich and complex flavor.

foods.name: Dead Vole
foods.description:
A small, freshly-killed rodent.

(Use in Cheap Meat recipes.)

foods.name: Coffee Beans
foods.description: Not edible by themselves, but useful in recipes.

foods.name: Snail
foods.description: A snail. It's about two inches in diameter. There are probably ways to prepare this for cooking.  It can also be used in Cheap Meat recipes.

foods.name: Hexameat
foods.description: Harvested from a very young hexapus (before the meat becomes inedible). There are probably special ways to prepare this for cooking. It can also be used in Cheap Meat recipes.

foods.name: Frog Legs
foods.description: Harvested from a largeish frog. A cooking ingredient that can also be used in Cheap Meat recipes.

foods.name: Ratkin Cheese Mold
foods.description: Dried but not dead, this exotic mold will spring to life when used in cheesemaking.

foods.name: Secret Vinegar
foods.description: This vinegar infusion is a closely-guarded secret.

foods.name: Vanilla
foods.description: The pods are too spicy to eat raw, but the powder scraped from them is a valuable spice for cooking.

foods.name: Soybeans
foods.description: Fresh soybeans, ready to be processed into edible food. They are too bitter to be eaten raw, but useful in cooking.

foods.name: Walnuts
foods.description: A handful of tasty walnuts.

foods.name: Amazing Pork Shoulder
foods.description: A chunk of raw boar meat from an amazing animal.

foods.name: Sourdough Starter
foods.description: Used in certain baking recipes.

foods.name: Werewolf Spit
foods.description: WARNING! This spittle is contaminated with the Lycanthropy disease. Drinking it will make you a werewolf instantly and forever! There is NO cure.

foods.name: Beaker of Xegatis
foods.description: This beaker is one of Xegatis' early failed attempts at restoring flesh to Nightmare Creatures. A crude Necromancy Gem is embedded in the bottom.

foods.name: Clownfish
foods.description: A raw fish.

foods.name: War Flask
foods.description: The great alchemists of yore supposedly used flasks like this when they fought in wars. Or perhaps that's just a tale invented to sell flasks.

foods.name: Dwarf-Inspired Beaker
foods.description: The creator of this beaker designed it around what he thought dwarves would use in combat. He was utterly wrong in every way, but the beaker is still pretty powerful.

foods.name: Spillproof Flask
foods.description: Not great for splashing people, but pretty good for delivering healing concoctions.

foods.name: Grapefish
foods.description: A raw fish. So-called because of its vaguely bluish skin, the grapefish is actually fairly bland.

foods.name: Fish Beaker
foods.description: A beaker full of a very, very stinky substance.

foods.name: Tamoko's Beaker
foods.description: After barely losing the annual Statehelm archery contest, Tamoko gained fame when he returned the following year and used his newly-invented beaker to win the grand prize. The beaker design has since been replicated with his blessing, delighting archery fans but causing a terrible schism in the archery-contest establishment, many of whom consider battle chemistry to be "like cheating".

foods.name: "Povus Special" Beaker
foods.description: Designed by Povus's former master alchemist, Kimeta, and sold to Statehelm in large quantity.

foods.name: Cavefish
foods.description: A raw fish. Found in caves throughout the world, these blind fish are normally tiny, but can grow to surprising size in nature-magic-rich environments.

foods.name: Fluke's Frozen Beaker
foods.description: A seemingly frozen beaker that enables a strange influence over the weather.

foods.name: Green Vexfish
foods.description: A raw fish. Also known as Orcish Labyrinth Fish, these fish are surprisingly tasty when correctly prepared, but should not be eaten raw.

foods.name: Lungfish
foods.description: A raw fish. These strange fish originate in the distant continent of Fosulf. They require expert handling before they can be eaten safely, and few fishermen in Alharth know the technique.

foods.name: Flounder
foods.description: A raw fish. These hideous creatures are surprisingly tasty.

foods.name: Raw Oyster
foods.description: A lump of gummy meat. It's supposedly edible, but only expert gourmands can stomach its squishy grossness.

foods.name: Shrimp
foods.description: A big raw shrimp. It needs to be de-veined and cleaned before eating.

foods.name: Catfish
foods.description: A raw fish.

foods.name: Pinfish
foods.description: A raw fish.

foods.name: Sunfish
foods.description: A raw fish.

foods.name: Tigerfish
foods.description: A raw fish.

foods.name: Tonguefish
foods.description: A raw fish.

foods.name: Redfish
foods.description: A raw fish.

foods.name: Irmaki
foods.description: A raw fish.

foods.name: Crater Gar
foods.description: A raw fish.

foods.name: Striped Bass
foods.description: A raw fish.

foods.name: Pig Juice
foods.description: Test potion transforms you into a pig. Permanent until dispelled! WARNING: think before you drink!

foods.name: Clownfish Fillet
foods.description: A cleaned fish, ready for cooking.

foods.name: Goblinic Piercer
foods.description: Crafted by goblin slaves under the watchful eye of Gyrumpa, the legendary bowyer. He hated fun, and made sure his bows were especially taxing to use.

foods.name: Crab Meat
foods.description: Cleaned crab meat, ready for cooking

foods.name: Grapefish Fillet
foods.description: A cleaned fish, ready for cooking.

foods.description: A cleaned fish, ready for cooking.

foods.description: A cleaned fish, ready for cooking.

foods.name: Lungfish Fillet

foods.name: Cleaned Shrimp
foods.description: A peeled and de-veined shrimp, ready for cooking. It's also delicious raw.

foods.name: Catfish Fillet
foods.description: Expertly cleaned and ready for cooking.

foods.name: Pinfish Fillet
foods.description: A cleaned fish, ready for cooking.

foods.name: Sunfish Fillet
foods.description: A cleaned fish, ready for cooking.

foods.name: Tigerfish Fillet
foods.description: A cleaned fish, ready for cooking.

foods.name: Tonguefish Fillet
foods.description: A cleaned fish, ready for cooking.

foods.name: Redfish Fillet
foods.description: A cleaned fish, ready for cooking.
