foods.description: A cleaned fish, ready for cooking.

foods.name: Crater Gar Fillet
foods.description: A cleaned fish, ready for cooking.

foods.name: Striped Bass Fillet
foods.description: A cleaned fish, ready for cooking.

foods.name: Un-Pig Juice
foods.description: Dispels permanent pigification.

foods.name: Shoddy Brass Knuckles
foods.description: Made by an amateur, this punching weapon barely fits onto your hand. But sometimes an ugly, stupid-looking weapon can inspire more fear than a good weapon. Not really. But keep thinking that while you wear these.

foods.name: Corroded Brass Knuckles
foods.description: They've turned all green and gross. But they'll still work to make your punches more painful.

foods.name: Basic Brass Knuckles
foods.description: These fit over your knuckles to make your punches hurt more. Now with real faux-brass coating!

foods.name: Protruding Knuckles
foods.description: Designed to fit over leather gloves, these brass knuckles have nasty bumps to make your punches cause extra injury.

foods.name: Potato
foods.description: A raw potato.

foods.name: Fist of the Green Man
foods.description: This grim fist weapon was clearly inspired by the Human legend of the Green Man, a druid who supposedly wanders the forests and punches wayward teens to death if they're out past curfew.

foods.name: Onion
foods.description: A raw onion.

foods.name: Frog Punch
foods.description: Used by ranalon martial artists to great effect.

foods.name: Tamiq's Automated Puncherfist
foods.description: Designed (but never used) by the slightly-mad gadgeteer Tamiq. It uses a series of magically-powered cascading motors to augment the punching power.

foods.name: Cabbage
foods.description: A raw cabbage.

foods.name: Broccoli
foods.description: This head of broccoli looks a lot like a little green tree.

foods.name: Carrot
foods.description: Orange and pointy. Yup, it's a carrot.

foods.name: Red Apple
foods.description: A shiny red apple.

foods.name: Grapes
foods.description: A big bunch of purple grapes.

foods.name: Orange
foods.description: An orange.

foods.name: Guava
foods.description: A plump ripe guava.

foods.name: Banana
foods.description: This banana is in good shape - no brown spots yet.

foods.name: Lemon
foods.description: A bright yellow lemon.

foods.name: Green Pepper
foods.description: A big lush bell pepper.

foods.name: Red Pepper
foods.description: A spicy red pepper.

foods.name: Pear
foods.description: A big ripe pear.

foods.name: Peach
foods.description: A ripe, fuzzy peach.

foods.name: Corn
foods.description: A fresh uncooked ear of corn. Corn is a bit of a delicacy in the Council Lands, although it's extremely common elsewhere.

foods.name: Green Apple
foods.description: Tart and sweet. A delicacy to some, but not as versatile for cooking as red apples.

foods.name: Sprigganberries
foods.description: Fruit from a strange plant that grows in the fae realm. While delicious, sprigganberries are incredibly poisonous unless the tiny seeds are carefully removed. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Cantaloupe
foods.description: A large sweet fruit. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Peas
foods.description: Fresh green peas, ready for cooking.

foods.name: Cranberries
foods.description: Some fresh cranberries. Too bitter to be eaten raw, but useful in cooking.

foods.name: Swamp Gourd
foods.description: A large gourd full of sticky bitter mush. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Orcish Wheat
foods.description: Wheat with a finer quality, preferred over Human wheat for certain dishes.

foods.name: Tomato
foods.description: A watery fruit from the distant crone lands. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Orcish Flour
foods.description: Made from orcish wheat. This has a notably superior taste to human wheat flour, and is preferred for high-end baked goods.

foods.name: Evu Fruit
foods.description: This bioluminescent fruit smells like death, but has a pleasant mild taste. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Horse Apple
foods.description: This is basically inedible. It has limited alchemical uses.

foods.name: Mulberries
foods.description: A big bunch of semisweet mulberries.

foods.name: Cornmeal

foods.name: Cocoa Beans
foods.description: Cooking goodness is trapped inside.

foods.name: Primitive Cocoa Powder

foods.name: Wild Garlic
foods.description: A powerful flavor used by master chefs.

foods.name: Deer Juice

foods.name: Classic Lute

foods.name: Buckle of Arisetsu
foods.description: A belt buckle with a holy symbol painted on it, allowing the wearer to tap into the grace of Arisetsu. Unfortunately, the belt is extremely painful to wear, and even worse, the paint is very delicate: prolonged use in combat will cause the belt to break, requiring replacement.

foods.name: Buckle of Swift Slagging
foods.description:
An elegant buckle covered in symbols. There's lots of hammers.

This buckle slowly decays when worn in combat until it eventually disappears.

foods.name: Buckle of Hastened Slagging
foods.description:
An elegant buckle covered in symbols. There's lots of hammers and clubs.

This buckle slowly decays when worn in combat until it eventually disappears.

foods.name: Buckle of Fast Slagging
foods.description:
An elegant buckle covered in symbols. There's demonic beings swinging hammers, among other things.

This buckle slowly decays when worn in combat until it eventually disappears.

foods.name: Buckle of Slagging Blurs
foods.description:
An elegant buckle covered in symbols. The most prominent symbol is a god-like being swinging a hammer.

This buckle slowly decays when worn in combat until it eventually disappears.

foods.name: Buckle of Confident Pounding 1
foods.description:
Crude, ugly, and stupid, this buckle gives the wearer a sense of boldness. Only a bold warrior would wear this in public.

This buckle quickly decays when worn in combat, eventually disappearing.

foods.name: Buckle of Confident Pounding 2

foods.name: Jake's Eternal Buckle
foods.description: This buckle has a depiction of Jake the Buckler holding a hammer. It's not very impressive, but a strange magic is keeping the buckle from decaying or breaking. Perhaps it'd make a good backup buckle.

foods.name: Quality Arachnid Mechaharness

This crumbly cheese is mild and bland, but it's nourishing.

foods.description: Stir-fried eel with juicy cabbage.

foods.name: Bland Baked Chicken
foods.description: Overcooked and dry, but adequate.

foods.description: Stir-fried chicken with broccoli and other vegetables.

foods.name: Lemon-Glazed Chicken
foods.description: Baked with a delicate lemon glaze. Delicious!

foods.name: Chicken Casserole
foods.description: Baked chicken in a complex dish. This one was cooked just right and has a variety of textures.

foods.name: Beginner's Buttermilk
foods.description: A disgusting concoction created by someone who doesn't understand certain important concepts. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Hardtack
foods.description:
Some damp biscuits. Not appetizing, but much better than starving!

(For an hour after you eat food, you'll regenerate health and power between fights. And better food than this can regenerate you DURING combat, too!)

foods.name: Venison Psi-Mantis Style
foods.description: An odorous dish said to be palatable to psychic mantises.

foods.name: Chicken Psi-Mantis Style
foods.description: It smells bad, but... it doesn't taste too bad, actually.

foods.name: Venison Hash
foods.description: An improvement over basic hash browns. Greasy and salty, in a good way!

foods.name: Apple Juice

foods.name: Laura's Cheesy Beets
foods.description: Beets and cheese!

foods.name: Black Soup
foods.description: An orcish staple, famous for its lingering effect. It's... an acquired taste.

foods.name: Bitter-Mint Tea

foods.name: Shroom Feast

foods.name: Aromatic Chicken

foods.name: Basic Pepperpot

foods.name: Pepper Venison

foods.name: Selaxi's Scorpion Stinger

foods.name: Selaxi's Cactus Mixer

foods.name: Pumpkin Spice Tea

foods.name: Raw Egg Blend

foods.name: Scrambled Egg

foods.name: Dried Clownfish

foods.name: Dried Grapefish

foods.name: Dried Perch

foods.name: Dried Cave Fish

(This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Orange Cat

foods.name: Spicy Lemon Cat

foods.name: Nishika's Travel Snack

foods.name: Apple Shaved Ice

foods.name: Bacon-Lover's Omelet

foods.name: Clownfish Nigiri

foods.name: Crab Nigiri

foods.name: Grapefish Nigiri
foods.description: Raw grapefish on a ball of delicious rice.

foods.name: Perch Nigiri
foods.description: Raw perch on a ball of delicious rice.

foods.name: Eel Nigiri
foods.description: Raw eel on a ball of delicious rice.

foods.name: Candy Drop
foods.description: Packed with flavor, these candies make a wonderful summer treat.

foods.name: Frozen Fruit Pop
foods.description: Some fairies like to freeze fruit juice in strange shapes. This one is just a boring rounded bar, but it's still fun.

foods.name: Summer Sucker
foods.description: This amusing lollipop is very popular with elves.

foods.name: Sugar Catepillar
foods.description: A spun-sugar confection in the shape of a caterpillar, colored and flavored with natural fruit juices. It's a really good illusion. Are you sure you want to stick it in your mouth?

foods.name: Candy Pebbles
foods.description: These tart little sugar rocks are a popular summer-time sweet.

foods.name: Uraknocha Noodles
foods.description: Long, thin wheat noodles made in the orcish style. While most famous as the main ingredient in uraknocha, they are also used in many other dishes.

foods.name: Uraknocha
foods.description: A famous orcish pasta dish.

foods.name: Beef Spaghetti
foods.description: A human dish popular in the Crone Hegemony. This version is particularly fancy!

foods.name: Human-Style Pizza
foods.description: A human dish popular in the Crone Hegemony.

foods.name: Meaty Human-Style Pizza
foods.description: A human dish popular in the Crone Hegemony. This one is topped with bacon.

foods.name: Human-Style Pizza with Tofu
foods.description: A human dish popular in the Crone Hegemony. This one is topped with tofu pretending to be bacon.

foods.name: Orcish Flatbread
foods.description: Unleavened bread. The orcish version is a little better. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Flatbread Chips and Salsa
foods.description: Some simple salsa can really spice up any flatbread. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Orcish Chopped Salad
foods.description: Finely-diced vegetables nestled on a bed of fluffy orcish wheat.

foods.name: Great Chicken Couscous
foods.description: Tender chicken atop a fluffy mound of steamed orcish couscous, accompanied by the sweet crunch of carrots.

foods.name: Orcish Ragant
foods.description: Pillowy potato dumplings in a velvety sauce. The orcish version uses squash as well as other vegetables.

foods.name: Povus Ragant
foods.description: An orcish ragant with a very Povus flair.

foods.name: Hot Corn and Tomato Salad
foods.description: Nothing better than roasted veggies for a cold fall afternoon. Or any other time, really.

foods.name: Salmon with Roasted Tomatoes
foods.description: Mild flaky fish surrounded with bold roasted vegetables.

foods.name: Tomato Soup
foods.description: Classic creamy tomato soup.

foods.name: Pumpkin Tomato Soup
foods.description: Classic creamy tomato soup with cubes of roasted pumpkin.

foods.name: Beefy Tomato Soup
foods.description: Classic creamy tomato soup with crumbles of ground beef.

foods.name: "Meaty" Tomato Soup
foods.description: Classic creamy tomato soup with crumbles of well-seasoned tofu.

foods.name: Evu Fruit Smoothie
foods.description: Thick and sweet, yet very refreshing. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Candied Evu Fruit
foods.description: Thin slices of candied fruit sprinkled with walnut slices. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Tofu and Evu Fruit Skewers
foods.description: Chunks of roasted tofu and sweet evu fruit impaled on a stick.

foods.name: Evu Mint Pork
foods.description: Tender cuts of pork delicately flavored with fruit and sprigged with mint.

foods.name: Evu Nut Salad
foods.description: The freshest greens topped with nuts and the sweet flesh of the evu fruit.

foods.name: Mulberry Salad
foods.description: The sweet berries pair nicely with crunchy lettuce and zesty dressing.

foods.name: Simple Wild Salad
foods.description: A fresh, zesty, very simple salad.

foods.name: Amazing Venison Jerky
foods.description: As far as meat jerkies go, it really doesn't get much better than this.

foods.name: Drummond's Special Jerky
foods.description: A jerky bite that makes your mouth water just from thinking about it.

foods.name: Neth Bread
foods.description: [We had a whole Baking skill planned but it turned out to be tedious and I hated it, and now it's unclear if there'll be any kind of skill for it. Maybe they'll just be regular cooking recipes but under a sub-skill or something like that. In the mean time here's a sample bread so the poor baker has something to sell.]

foods.name: Brukwint
foods.description: A goblin sandwich. Savory mushrooms topped with spices and stacked between two slices of Goblin Bread.

foods.name: Brukwintrat
foods.description: Roughly translates to "Brukwint with Cheese", this is a traditional goblin sandwich with a slice of decadent cheese added.

foods.name: Brukwintcow
foods.description: Roughly translates to "Brukwint with Meat", this is a traditional goblin sandwich but the mushroom has been replaced by meat of some kind, making it even more delicious.

foods.name: Brukwintratcow
foods.description: Roughly translates to "Brukwint with Meat & Cheese", this is so far removed from the traditional goblin sandwich (Brukwint) that it shouldn't even share the same name. It is savory meat topped with decadent cheese and spices, squished between two slices of Goblin Bread.

foods.name: Brukwint
foods.description: A goblin sandwich. Savory mushrooms topped with spices and stacked between two slices of Goblin Bread.

foods.name: Brukwont
foods.description: A "lesser" goblin sandwich. Chewy mushrooms topped with salt and stacked between day-old Goblin Wheatbread.

foods.name: Brukwontrat
foods.description: Roughly translates to "Brukwont with Cheese", this is a traditional "lesser" goblin sandwich with a slice of decadent cheese added.

foods.name: Fried Catfish
foods.description: A simple greasy salty snack. Best eaten hot. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)

foods.name: Basic Cornbread
foods.description: An easy-to-make snack.

foods.name: Cornbread Cheddar Biscuit
foods.description: A delicious cheesy snack.

foods.name: Orange Polenta Cake
foods.description: A complex, dense cake.

foods.name: Great Venison Jerky
foods.description: Dry most of the way through, but still a bit juicy. This hits the spot.

foods.name: Braised Human in Elf Gravy
foods.description: Perfectly-braised tender human loin in a savory sauce made of elf blood and organs.

foods.name: Charblasted Remnants
foods.description: Nearly charcoal but technically edible, this comes from some sort of beast.

foods.name: Flame-Blasted Filet
foods.description: Certainly "well done" and perhaps a bit beyond that, but at least it's fresh.

foods.name: Spell-Seared Cutlet
foods.description: Mystery meat that has been cooked alive to perfection. It makes a tasty snack.

foods.name: Ember-Kissed Flank
foods.description: An exquisite morsel from some sort of creature that was cooked alive. The juices have been locked in and the aroma is tantalizing.

foods.name: Flesh Lump (Human)
foods.description: A lump of flesh. Very disturbing. Very chewy.

foods.name: Flesh Lump (Elf)
foods.description: A lump of flesh. Very disturbing. Very chewy.

foods.name: Flesh Lump (Rakshasa)
foods.description: A lump of flesh. Very disturbing. Very chewy.

foods.name: Flesh Lump (Fairy)
foods.description: A lump of flesh. Very disturbing. Very chewy.

foods.name: Flesh Lump (Orc)
foods.description: A lump of flesh. Very disturbing. Very chewy.

foods.name: Flesh Lump (Dwarf)
foods.description: A lump of flesh. Very disturbing. Very chewy.

foods.name: Buttermilk Barley Biscuit
foods.description: A pleasant biscuit with a rustic, nutty flavor.

foods.name: Malt Loaf
foods.description: A hearty filling bread.

foods.name: Deluxe Malt Loaf
foods.description: A hearty filling bread.

foods.name: Infernal Egg
foods.description: An evil-looking egg. Probably best not to eat this.

foods.name: Infernal Meat
foods.description: Whatever type of meat this once was, it's completely overrun with demonic energy now.

foods.name: Rye Bread
foods.description: A basic but filling rye. Has a complex aroma and hints of molasses.

foods.name: Beer Bread
foods.description: A dense and delicious rye bread with strong hints of beer.

foods.name: Simple Sourdough
foods.description: A plain but tasty loaf of sourdough.

foods.name: Pumpernickel Bread
foods.description: A rich, dense, slightly sweet bread.

foods.name: Deviled Egg
foods.description:
A hard-boiled egg, sliced in half, with the yolk taken out and replaced with the essence of an infernal hellspawn, then sprinkled with some spices. Just like mom used to make!

In addition to the usual food effects, this meal also reduces the power cost effect of Hellfire by 25%.

foods.name: Demonic Roast
foods.description:
An unidentifiable hunk of meat, imbued with demonic essence, and roasted to perfection.

In addition to the usual food effects, this meal also reduces the power cost effect of Hellfire by 25%.

foods.name: Infernal Soup
foods.description:
A tasty soup with little bits of delectable meat floating around in it, infused with demonic essence.

In addition to the usual food effects, this meal also reduces the power cost effect of Hellfire by 25%.

foods.name: Human-Style Pizza with Souls
foods.description:
A human dish popular in the Crone Hegemony. This one is topped with tiny infernal souls that dance across the cheese and let out little hellish screams from time to time. So cute!

Note: Souls do not count as meat, so this is technically vegetarian.

In addition to the usual food effects, this meal also reduces the power cost effect of Hellfire by 25%.

foods.name: Honey Oat Muffin
foods.description: A dense and energizing snack.

foods.name: Fuzzlebun's Energy Bar
foods.description: A powerful pick-me-up for rabbits in danger.

foods.name: Oat Brownies
foods.description: A dense and energizing snack.

foods.name: Oatmeal
foods.description: A dense and filling meal.

foods.name: Oat Pumpkin Bread
foods.description: A sweet yet savory holiday meal.

foods.name: Masterful Banana Bread
foods.description: A loaf of enticing, lucious banana bread.

foods.name: Moon Muffins
foods.description: A heavenly snack that is squash-flavored, but in a good way.

foods.name: Haunting Juice
foods.description: Test potion to haunt you.

foods.name: De-Haunting Juice
foods.description: Dispels haunting.

foods.name: Spider Juice
foods.description: This potion transforms you into a spider. Permanent until dispelled! WARNING: think before you drink!

foods.name: Un-Spider Juice
foods.description: Dispels permanent spiderification.

foods.name: Cow Juice
foods.description: Test potion transforms you into a cow. Permanent until dispelled! WARNING: think before you drink!

foods.name: Un-Cow Juice
foods.description: Dispels permanent cowification.

foods.name: PvP Juice
foods.description: Makes you PvP for testing.

foods.name: Un-PvP Juice
foods.description: Turns off PvP caused by PvP Juice test-potions.

foods.name: PvP Juice (30 minutes)
foods.description: Makes you PvP-flagged for a half hour. You can attack other players who are also PvP-flagged.

foods.name: PvP Juice (60 minutes)
foods.description: Makes you PvP for an hour.

foods.name: Eternal Greens
foods.description: Strange weeds that supposedly bring the dead back to life.

foods.name: Special PK Juice
foods.description: Makes you PvP against ALL players -- even ones who don't want to PvP! Used for live events only! Use UnPvPJuice to turn it off.

foods.name: Superspider Juice
foods.description: Potion transforms you into a GIGANTIC spider. Permanent until dispelled via UnspiderJuice. For live events only!

foods.name: Bat Juice
foods.description: Test potion transforms you into a giant bat. Permanent until dispelled! WARNING: think before you drink!

foods.name: Un-Bat Juice
foods.description: Dispels permanent batification.

foods.name: Un-Bunny Juice
foods.description: Dispels permanent rabbitization.

foods.name: Fox Juice
foods.description: Transforms you into a spirit fox. Permanent until dispelled! WARNING: think before you drink!

foods.name: UnFoxJuice
foods.description: Dispels permanent foxification.

foods.name: Skeleton Juice
foods.description: Transforms you into a skeleton. Permanent until dispelled! WARNING: think before you drink!

foods.name: UnSkeletonJuice
foods.description: Dispels permanent skeletonization.

foods.name: Vampire Juice
foods.description: Makes you a vampire. Permanent! Cannot be cured even with a Minor Panacea.

foods.name: Un-Vampire Juice
foods.description: Removes vampirism.
